About Me

Passionate About Data & Insights

I'm Waqas Khan, a motivated and detail-oriented Data Analyst pursuing a B.S. in Data Science at the University of Malakand (2024–2028). Proficient in SQL, Python, and data visualization tools with real project experience in data cleaning, EDA, and dashboard development.

My goal is to transform raw datasets into actionable insights that support data-driven decision-making. I'm adept at building Power BI dashboards, conducting statistical analysis, and presenting findings in a clear, impactful way — seeking an entry-level or remote Data Analyst role.

Featured Projects

Power BIExcelSQL
Sales Performance Dashboard
Gathered and cleaned sales data from 3 regional branches covering 2 years. Designed a multi-page Power BI dashboard with KPI cards, trend lines, and drill-through filters — identifying top 5 products accounting for 62% of total sales.
📁 3 regional branches📅 2024

PythonPandasMatplotlibSeaborn
E-Commerce Customer Churn Analysis
Analyzed 8,000+ customer records to uncover churn patterns. Performed EDA across 12 behavioral metrics — discovering 70% of churned customers had not engaged in 30 days, guiding retention strategy with projected 18% churn reduction.
📁 8K+ customers📅 2024
GitHub Notebook
🦠
PythonPandasPlotlySQL
COVID-19 Data Analysis & Visualization
Extracted and cleaned 50,000+ rows of public COVID-19 data. Created interactive visualizations of case trends, vaccination rates, and mortality across 20+ countries. Applied time-series analysis with moving averages.
📁 50K+ rows, 20+ countries📅 2024
GitHub Report

ExcelPower QueryPivotTables
Student Performance Analytics
Compiled academic data for 200+ students across 6 subjects. Built automated PivotTable dashboards with conditional formatting to highlight at-risk students — reducing manual reporting effort by 50%. Adopted by academic staff.
📁 200+ students📅 2023
GitHub Download

House Price Prediction Model
Built a Random Forest regression model to predict house prices using 15 features. Achieved 89% accuracy with full feature importance analysis and cross-validation pipeline.
